description_html:
Is it possible to reason with someone who believes that corroborated evidence is part of the deception of conspiracy theories? In this episode, Frank responds to a question from a concerned husband whose marriage is under serious strain due to conspiracy theories surrounding the murder of Charlie Kirk. While discussing the Tyler Robinson preliminary hearing […]

The post “HELP! Conspiracy Theories Are Ruining My Marriage!” 37 Questions to Consider appeared first on CrossExamined.
